attributes.keywords: EARTH SCIENCE > Oceans > Salinity/Density, EARTH SCIENCE > Oceans > Ocean Temperature > Water Temperature
attributes.title: Ocean temperature and salinity data from surface mooring NTAS deployment 15
attributes.summary: Delayed mode salinity data from the WHOI-UOP Ocean Reference Station deployed at the NTAS site in 2016 by Albert Plueddemann
attributes.citation:
Data from the NTAS Ocean Reference Station were collected and published by 
            Dr. Albert Plueddemann of the Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution 2020-12-08.  The data is made freely 
            available by the OceanSITES project and by the national programs that contribute to it.
attributes.acknowledgement:
This project is funded by the Global Ocean Monitoring and Observing (GOMO) Program, 
            formerly the Ocean Observing and Monitoring Division, Climate Program Office (FundRef number 100007298), 
            National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration,
            U.S. Department of Commerce, under grant NA14OAR4320158.

attributes.comment: Combined data from instruments on surface mooring
attributes.quality_control_procedure: Data manually reviewed, clock drift corrected
attributes.processing_level: Drift corrections, post-calibrations, despiking done; clocks corrected as needed
